{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Soldier
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Soldier]] is a self-replicating undead weapon.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
